race.comment: BRINDAVAN (8) has hit a purple patch of form with two wins and a second from his past three outings and is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from gate four. Must be respected out of the Gollan barn and looks the one they all have to run down. AKKADIAN EMPEROR (9) has put back-to-back victories together and gets the services of Thompson in the irons to navigate from the outside draw. Genuine top-three prospects. PRINCE LEVI (3) goes well for jockey Du Plessis who has only missed a place once in six steers. Include from the inside marble. GLORY DAZE (1) strips fitter third-up from the spell and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. In the mix. ARTFUL GIRL (6) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
